feedbackMessages.thankYouMessage: Your feedback has been recorded and a new leaf has been added to our digital tree!
feedbackMessages.thankYouFooter: Thank you for contributing to our sustainability journey at Republic Polytechnic!
feedbackMessages.consentPrompt: Your feedback helps us create a more sustainable future. Your responses will be kept confidential.
feedbackMessages.detailsPrompt: Please provide your details so we can track your contributions.
feedbackMessages.feedbackPrompt: Share your thoughts on our sustainability initiatives.
feedbackMessages.pledgePrompt: Would you like to make a pledge to support sustainability?

emailContent.thankYouSubject: Thank you for visiting RP ESG Centre, {name}!
emailContent.thankYouIntro: Thank you for taking the time to visit our ESG Experience Centre and sharing your feedback. Attached below is your commemorative photo from your visit.
emailContent.thankYouClosing: We hope your experience has inspired you to take meaningful steps towards sustainability. Your feedback helps us improve and create better experiences for future visitors.
emailContent.footerNote: This is an automated email sent from the RP ESG kiosk system. Please do not reply to this message.
